headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -72.2)
key_insights: Frustrations trending down 16% over 7 days (moderate momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 142 quotes and a strikingly high proportion of strong-intensity posts (119 out of 142), driving the score to 68.5 — people are venting forcefully today.
• Frustration levels sit in the upper half of the 176-day range, while Optimism has dropped sharply from yesterday (-9.5 to -29.2), nearing its historical low.
• Fears remain subdued and below average, suggesting anxieties are not the primary mood driver today.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
